audits.name: Claims Automation Technology Investment Audit
audits.description: Comprehensive audit of €12M claims automation build including project governance, vendor management, AI model risk, and financial controls

audits.name: Nordics Wind-Down Restructuring Audit
audits.description: Audit of Nordics strategic exit covering customer transition, asset disposition, restructuring provisions, and regulatory compliance

audits.name: Revenue Recognition & Geographic Allocation Audit
audits.description: Audit of revenue recognition practices across jurisdictions during portfolio transition, including ASC 606/IFRS 15 compliance

audits.name: AI Governance & EU AI Act Compliance Audit
audits.description: Assessment of AI model governance, algorithmic accountability, and emerging EU AI Act compliance for claims adjudication and fraud detection systems

audits.name: Mid-Market Retention Controls Audit
audits.description: Audit of mid-market client retention processes, GRR tracking, and churn prevention controls

audits.name: CSRD & ESG Compliance Readiness Audit
audits.description: Assessment of CSRD compliance readiness, ESG data quality, and sustainability reporting controls

audit_findings.title: Insufficient AI Model Validation Framework
audit_findings.criteria: AI models used in automated claims adjudication must have documented validation frameworks per EU AI Act requirements and internal AI governance policy
audit_findings.condition: Current AI model validation relies on development team self-assessment without independent validation or ongoing performance monitoring
audit_findings.cause: Rapid development timeline for claims automation engine prioritized speed over governance framework establishment
audit_findings.effect: Risk of biased or inaccurate claims decisions, potential regulatory non-compliance with EU AI Act high-risk system requirements
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish independent AI model validation function with documented procedures, implement ongoing model performance monitoring, and create model risk inventory
audit_findings.management_response: Agree with finding. AI Center of Excellence will establish model validation framework by Q2 2025. Interim manual review process implemented for all production model changes.

audit_findings.title: Legacy System Integration Documentation Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: All system integrations must have documented architecture, data flows, and control points per IT Change Management Policy
audit_findings.condition: API integration between claims automation engine and legacy claims management system lacks complete technical documentation and control mapping
audit_findings.cause: Phase 1 API remediation focused on functional completion over documentation; historical technical debt in legacy system documentation
audit_findings.effect: Increased risk of integration failures, difficulty in troubleshooting, and challenges in maintaining regulatory audit trails
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete integration documentation including data flow diagrams, control points, and error handling procedures. Implement documentation requirements in development workflow.
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Documentation sprint initiated with target completion by end of Q2. Technical writer engaged to support development team.

audit_findings.title: Incomplete Customer Transition Controls
audit_findings.criteria: Customer transitions during strategic exit must follow documented procedures ensuring data migration integrity and service continuity
audit_findings.condition: Customer transition process lacks standardized playbook; 3 of 12 customer migrations experienced data reconciliation issues requiring manual intervention
audit_findings.cause: Nordics exit timeline compressed; transition procedures developed ad-hoc rather than systematically
audit_findings.effect: Risk of customer dissatisfaction, data integrity issues, potential contractual disputes, and reputation damage in EMEA market
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop standardized customer transition playbook with checkpoints, implement automated reconciliation checks, and establish dedicated transition team oversight
audit_findings.management_response: Finding acknowledged. Transition playbook under development with Quality Assurance team. Remaining customer migrations on hold pending playbook completion.

audit_findings.title: Restructuring Reserve Calculation Methodology
audit_findings.criteria: Restructuring provisions must be calculated using documented methodology consistent with IFRS requirements and reviewed by qualified actuary
audit_findings.condition: Initial restructuring reserve calculation did not include documented assumptions or sensitivity analysis; methodology review by actuarial function was informal
audit_findings.cause: Urgency of Q4 2024 financial close combined with Chief Actuary transition created process gaps
audit_findings.effect: Risk of material misstatement in restructuring provisions; regulatory scrutiny from BaFin on reserve adequacy
audit_findings.recommendation: Document reserve calculation methodology, implement formal actuarial sign-off process, and conduct sensitivity analysis for key assumptions
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Working with interim Chief Actuary to document methodology. External actuarial firm engaged to provide independent review of assumptions.

audit_findings.title: GRR Tracking System Data Quality
audit_findings.criteria: Gross Revenue Retention metrics must be calculated from system of record with documented data quality controls
audit_findings.condition: GRR calculation relies on manual spreadsheet consolidation with limited automated validation; minor discrepancies identified between source systems
audit_findings.cause: Mid-market CRM system integration incomplete; manual processes fill gap
audit_findings.effect: Potential for GRR reporting errors affecting management decision-making and investor communications
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete CRM integration for automated GRR calculation; implement data quality dashboard with reconciliation alerts
audit_findings.management_response: Implemented automated GRR calculation with daily reconciliation to source systems. Manual process retired.

audit_findings.title: CSRD Data Collection Process Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: CSRD reporting requires documented data collection processes with defined ownership, validation procedures, and audit trail
audit_findings.condition: ESG data collection relies on decentralized spreadsheet submissions from business units without standardized templates or validation rules
audit_findings.cause: CSRD compliance program recently initiated; data collection infrastructure not yet mature
audit_findings.effect: Risk of incomplete or inaccurate CSRD disclosures; potential regulatory penalties and commercial disadvantage in enterprise sales
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement centralized ESG data management platform, standardize collection templates, establish data validation procedures, and define clear ownership
audit_findings.management_response: ESG data platform RFP issued. Implementation planned for Q3 2025 with Finance and Operations stakeholder involvement.

control_assessments.test_evidence: Reviewed monthly competitive intelligence reports from Jan-Mar 2025. Coverage includes Guidewire-Shift integration milestones, product announcements, and market positioning changes.
Reviewed steering committee minutes for Jan-Mar 2025. All gate reviews conducted as scheduled with documented approval or escalation decisions.
Automated integration tests running continuously. 2 of 15 critical API integrations showing intermittent failures requiring manual intervention. Documentation gaps identified per audit finding FND-2.
Reserve calculations reviewed monthly. Actuarial sign-off informal pending Chief Actuary succession. Documentation methodology gaps identified per audit finding FND-4.
Model validation conducted but independence of validation function not fully established. Audit finding FND-1 requires remediation.
Transition playbook developed but 3 of 12 customer migrations experienced data reconciliation issues. Playbook being enhanced per audit finding FND-3.
ESG data collection active but relying on decentralized spreadsheets. Validation procedures inconsistent across business units. Audit finding FND-6 documented gaps.
SOC operating 24/7 with average incident detection time under 15 minutes. No critical incidents in Q1 2025. MTTD and MTTR within targets.

control_deficiencies.description: API integration testing showing intermittent failures for 2 of 15 critical integrations; documentation gaps affecting troubleshooting effectiveness
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Phase 1 API remediation prioritized functional completion over documentation completeness
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete technical documentation for all API integrations; implement enhanced error handling for failing integrations

control_deficiencies.description: Restructuring reserve calculations lack documented methodology and formal actuarial sign-off process
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Chief Actuary transition and Q4 2024 financial close urgency created process gaps
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Document reserve calculation methodology; implement formal actuarial review and sign-off process; engage external actuarial firm for independent review

control_deficiencies.description: AI model validation relies on development team self-assessment without independent validation function
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Rapid development timeline for claims automation engine prioritized delivery over governance structure
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Establish independent AI model validation function within AI Center of Excellence; implement documented validation procedures; deploy ongoing model performance monitoring

control_deficiencies.description: Customer transition playbook inadequate; 3 of 12 customer migrations experienced data reconciliation issues
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Nordics exit timeline compressed; transition procedures developed ad-hoc
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop comprehensive transition playbook with checkpoints; implement automated reconciliation checks; establish dedicated transition team oversight

control_deficiencies.description: ESG data collection relies on decentralized spreadsheets without standardized templates or validation rules
control_deficiencies.root_cause: CSRD compliance program recently initiated; data collection infrastructure not yet mature
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement centralized ESG data management platform; standardize collection templates; establish data validation procedures

objectives.name: Strategic Market Position
objectives.description: Maintain and strengthen competitive position in EMEA insurance technology market

objectives.name: Customer Retention Excellence
objectives.description: Achieve and maintain GRR above 90% across all customer segments

objectives.name: Technology Platform Excellence
objectives.description: Deliver claims automation capabilities and reduce technical debt

objectives.name: Financial Performance & Sustainability
objectives.description: Achieve EBITDA margin targets while maintaining debt covenant compliance

objectives.name: Nordics Exit Execution
objectives.description: Complete strategic exit from Nordics market by Q2 FY2026 with minimal disruption

objectives.name: Talent & Leadership Continuity
objectives.description: Ensure leadership continuity through succession planning for critical roles

objectives.name: Regulatory Compliance
objectives.description: Maintain compliance with all applicable regulations including EU AI Act and GDPR

objectives.name: ESG Leadership
objectives.description: Achieve CSRD compliance and leverage ESG as competitive differentiator

objectives.name: Third-Party Resilience
objectives.description: Maintain operational resilience through effective vendor management

objectives.name: Security & Resilience
objectives.description: Maintain robust cybersecurity posture and business continuity capabilities

standards_regulations.name: EU AI Act
standards_regulations.description: Regulation on artificial intelligence establishing harmonized rules for high-risk AI systems

standards_regulations.name: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
standards_regulations.description: Regulation on data protection and privacy for individuals within the EU

standards_regulations.name: Solvency II
standards_regulations.description: Directive on insurance and reinsurance regulation harmonizing EU insurance supervision

standards_regulations.name: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
standards_regulations.description: Directive on corporate sustainability reporting requirements

standards_regulations.name: PRA Rulebook
standards_regulations.description: UK prudential regulation rules for insurance firms

requirements.name: High-Risk AI System Documentation
requirements.description: High-risk AI systems must maintain technical documentation including design specifications, model performance metrics, and risk management measures

requirements.name: AI System Risk Management
requirements.description: Establish and maintain risk management systems for high-risk AI including identification, analysis, and mitigation of risks

requirements.name: Data Protection Impact Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct DPIA for processing likely to result in high risk to individuals

requirements.name: Data Subject Rights
requirements.description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month

requirements.name: Breach Notification
requirements.description: Notify supervisory authority within 72 hours of becoming aware of a personal data breach

requirements.name: Double Materiality Assessment
requirements.description: Conduct double materiality assessment covering impact materiality and financial materiality

requirements.name: ESG Data Quality
requirements.description: Ensure accuracy, completeness, and comparability of ESG data reported

requirements.name: Information Security Controls
requirements.description: Implement appropriate information security controls based on risk assessment

evidence.description: Claims automation project steering committee meeting minutes Jan-Mar 2025
AI model development documentation and validation reports
Nordics customer transition tracker and migration logs
GRR tracking system export with reconciliation to CRM
Annual penetration test report from qualified third party

requests.request_description: Provide steering committee meeting minutes and gate review documentation for claims automation project from January through March 2025
Provide AI model development documentation including design specifications, validation methodology, and performance metrics
Provide customer transition tracker and data migration reconciliation logs for Nordics wind-down
Provide restructuring reserve calculation workpapers including assumptions and actuarial review documentation
Provide GRR tracking system export with reconciliation to underlying CRM data
Provide CSRD double materiality assessment documentation and ESG data collection procedures
Provide revenue recognition memos for complex contract arrangements in FY2025
Provide AI system inventory with EU AI Act risk classifications

assessment_methods.name: Document Review
assessment_methods.description: Review of policies, procedures, reports, and other documentation to assess design and operating effectiveness

assessment_methods.name: Inquiry and Observation
assessment_methods.description: Discussions with process owners and observation of control execution

assessment_methods.name: Reperformance
assessment_methods.description: Independent re-execution of control procedures to validate operating effectiveness

assessment_methods.name: Data Analytics
assessment_methods.description: Analysis of system data and transaction populations to identify anomalies or exceptions

assessment_methods.name: Expert Assessment
assessment_methods.description: Subject matter expert evaluation of risk likelihood and impact

assessment_methods.name: Scenario Analysis
assessment_methods.description: Analysis of potential risk scenarios and their business impact

assessment_methods.name: Automated Testing
assessment_methods.description: Automated execution and validation of control procedures

assessment_methods.name: Walkthrough
assessment_methods.description: End-to-end process walkthrough to understand design and identify control points
